mapper.select: Select ISNULL(Sum(case callresult when 11 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as response, ISNULL(Sum(case callresult when 13 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as giveup, ISNULL(Avg(case callresult when 11 then SangdamSec end), 0) as avgcalltime, ISNULL(Avg(case callresult when 11 then CustWaitSec end), 0) as avgstanbytime, ISNULL((Select count(*) From POLARIS.dbo.CALLBACK where regdate = #{yyyyMMdd} and callret in ('00','02','03','05')), 0) as callback From POLARIS.dbo.CDR_${yyyyMM} Where sdate = #{yyyyMMdd} and linetype = '01' AND CallID <> '' /*and grpName = '상담그룹'*/

SELECT CallBackKey, RegDate, RegTime, RegWeek, TelNum, CustInfo, AgentID, CallDate, CallTime, CallRet, Memo, ReqGrp, VoiceMsg, AgentName, CID, ServiceID, Del_YN, VoiceFile, VoiceSec, S_Sec, E_Sec FROM POLARIS.dbo.CALLBACK WHERE CallRet IN ('00','02','03','04','05') AND AgentID = #{AgentID} ;
mapper.update: UPDATE POLARIS.dbo.CALLBACK SET AgentID = #{NewAgentID}, AgentName = #{NewAgentName}, CallDate = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112), CallTime = FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'HHmmss'), CallRet ='01' WHERE CallBackKey = #{CallBackKey};
mapper.select: SELECT CallID, LineType, SliNum, GrpName, AgtID, AgtName, TrkNum, SDate, STime, SWeek, SangdamSec, CustWaitSec, TotalUseSec, IO, CallResult, GrpType, SMDR, TelNum, DNIS, TransferNum, AgtCnt, TransferCnt, ConferenceCnt, Reserved_1, Reserved_2, Reserved_3, Reserved_4, Reserved_5 FROM POLARIS.dbo.CDR_${yyyyMM} WHERE 1 = 1 AND LineType = '01' --AND IO = 'I' AND CallResult <> '0' AND SDate = #{yyyyMMdd} AND CallID <> ''
